summary: Built a complete Flutter driver mobile app and extended the Django backend. Backend: added approval_status, fcm_token, is_on_duty, registered_at fields to Driver model via migration 0002; added REST API endpoints (register, login, profile, duty toggle, available orders, my orders, accept/on_way/complete/cancel); added TokenAuthentication; updated admin with bulk approve/reject actions; updated views/urls for driver_approve route and pending tab. Web panel: driver list now has 3 tabs (approved/pending/rejected) with approve/reject buttons; dashboard shows pending driver alert banner. Flutter app (vijdon_driver_app): login screen with phone+password, register screen with pending approval success state, home screen with duty toggle and live order list, order cards with context-aware action buttons (accept/on_way/complete/cancel), history screen, profile screen. Android manifest updated with INTERNET permission. flutter analyze shows 0 errors (only deprecation infos).
current_status: Backend is fully ready and migrated. Flutter app compiles with no errors. To build APK: cd vijdon_driver_app && flutter build apk --release. Base URL is set to https://vijdontaxi.uz/panel/api in lib/core/constants.dart.
